targets.boundary: Company-wide (including supply chain and product life cycle)
targets.notes: Apple has stated it aims to be carbon neutral across its entire carbon footprint by 2030, primarily by reducing emissions ~75% versus 2015 and addressing remaining emissions via carbon removal/offset projects.
targets.title: Apple 2030: carbon neutral across entire footprint

targets.notes: Apple has stated its corporate operations have been carbon neutral since 2020 (ongoing claim rather than a disclosed SBTi-validated target).
targets.title: Carbon neutral for corporate operations
